s: In 1983, Matt Williams suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 14.630, WHIP 2.500, SO 5, WAR -0.600.
Changed teams after the previous season (TOR -> TEX).
In 1985, Matt Williams suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.420, WHIP 1.150, SO 22, WAR 0.400. Notable context: Joined TEX.
